events.headline: US MILITARY ‘NOT READY’ TO ESCORT OIL SHIPS THROUGH HORMUZ, OFFICIAL SAYS

events.headline: VIDEO SHOWS MOMENT IRAN STRIKES US-OWNED OIL TANKER NEAR IRAQ
events.detail: Iran has released video it says shows the moment one of its explosive-laden boats struck a US-owned oil tanker in Iraq.
